17145472.title: Jonathan Le Tocq
17145472.extract: Jonathan Paul Le Tocq (born 4 March 1964) is a former politician in Guernsey, Channel Islands, who served as the Chief Minister of Guernsey from 2014 to 2016. He is currently serving a sentence of 9 years imprisonment.
